q.en: What is one important benefit of the American school bus system described in the book?
q.zh: 书中描述的美国校车系统的一个重要好处是什么？

options.en: It helps students get to school safely and supports public education
options.zh: 帮助学生安全上学，并支持公共教育

explain.en: The book says the school bus system 'is one of the most important and complex mass transit systems in the country' and 'Buses support the American public school system, which promises every student an education.'
explain.zh: 书中说校车系统“是美国最重要、最复杂的公共交通系统之一”，并且“校车支持着承诺让每个学生接受教育的美国公立学校体系。”

q.en: About how many students used school buses daily in 2013?
q.zh: 2013年，大约有多少学生每天乘坐校车？

explain.en: In 2013, 'Slightly more than half of public school students, about twenty-six million of them, used school buses daily.'
explain.zh: 2013年，“超过一半的公立学校学生，约两千六百万人，每天乘坐校车上学。”

q.en: What does "mass transit" mean in this book?
q.zh: 在这本书里，“mass transit（大众交通）”是什么意思？

options.en: A public transportation system that moves large numbers of people
options.zh: 运送大量人群的公共交通系统

explain.en: The glossary defines mass transit as 'a public transportation system that moves large numbers of people using buses, subways, or trains.'
explain.zh: 词汇表将mass transit（大众交通）定义为“使用公交车、地铁或火车运送大量人群的公共交通系统。”

q.en: Why are school buses painted "National School Bus Glossy Yellow"?
q.zh: 校车为什么要漆成“国家校车亮黄色”？

options.en: Because yellow is the cheapest color
Because it is easy to spot so drivers can stop in time for students
options.zh: 因为黄色醒目，司机能及时停车让学生上下车
因为学生投票选了黄色

options.en: Because it matches the school uniform
options.zh: 因为它和学校制服颜色一致

explain.en: The book explains the yellow color 'was chosen because it was easy to spot. Because buses stand out on the road, drivers see them and stop in time.'
explain.zh: 书中解释，黄色“被选中是因为它容易辨认。校车在路上很显眼，司机能看到并及时停下。”

q.en: How is the rural school bus system in Kingman, Arizona, described compared to the state of Delaware?
q.zh: 亚利桑那州金曼的农村校车系统，与特拉华州相比是怎样的？

options.en: Its area is larger than the entire state of Delaware
options.zh: 它的面积比整个特拉华州还要大

options.en: It is the same size as Delaware
It has fewer students than Delaware
options.zh: 它的学生比特拉华州少

explain.en: The book notes the Kingman, Arizona rural bus system 'covers an area larger than the entire state of Delaware.'
explain.zh: 书中提到，亚利桑那州金曼的农村校车系统“覆盖的面积比整个特拉华州还要大。”

q.en: What is the author's main purpose in writing this book?
q.zh: 作者写这本书的主要目的是什么？

options.en: To persuade readers to stop riding buses
options.zh: 说服读者不要再坐校车

options.en: To inform readers about how the school bus system works and its benefits
options.zh: 向读者介绍校车系统如何运作及其好处

options.en: To tell a fictional story about a bus driver
options.zh: 讲述一个关于校车司机的虚构故事

options.en: To teach how to drive a car

explain.en: The author's focus question is 'What are the benefits of a school bus system?' and the book explains how the system works, its history, safety, and green changes.
explain.zh: 作者的核心问题是“校车系统有哪些好处？”，书中解释了该系统如何运作、它的历史、安全性以及环保改进。

q.en: According to the book, how much safer are school buses than private cars?
q.zh: 根据书中内容，校车比私家车安全多少倍？

explain.en: The book states: 'School buses are forty times safer than private cars.'
explain.zh: 书中写道：“校车比私家车安全四十倍。”

q.en: In what year did the U.S. Supreme Court rule that school segregation discriminated against African American students?
q.zh: 美国最高法院在哪一年裁定学校种族隔离对非裔美国学生构成歧视？

explain.en: In 1954, the U.S. Supreme Court 'said that school segregation discriminated against African American students, and integration began.'
explain.zh: 1954年，美国最高法院“判定学校种族隔离对非裔美国学生构成歧视，于是开始推行种族融合。”

q.en: What 'green' change do some school districts make to help the environment?
q.zh: 一些学区为了保护环境，做了什么“绿色”改变？

options.en: They use electric or propane engines instead of only regular fuel
options.zh: 使用电力或丙烷发动机，而不只用普通燃料

explain.en: Some districts use an electric engine or propane fuel; the book notes 'propane is much less expensive than normal bus fuel and less polluting.'
explain.zh: 一些学区使用电力发动机或丙烷燃料；书中提到“丙烷比普通校车燃料便宜得多，污染也更少。”

q.en: Why did many schools begin using buses for integration in the 1970s and 1980s?
q.zh: 为什么在1970和1980年代，许多学校开始用校车来推动种族融合？

options.en: To bring African American and white children together in schools
options.zh: 为了让非裔美国儿童和白人儿童在同一所学校就读

explain.en: After the 1954 ruling, 'school buses played an important part in school integration' by busing 'black students to white schools and white students to black schools.'
explain.zh: 1954年裁决之后，“校车在学校种族融合中发挥了重要作用”，把“黑人学生送到白人学校，白人学生送到黑人学校。”

prompt.en: Think about how students get to school in your area. Compare it with the U.S. school bus system described in the book. Write a few sentences about the differences and similarities.
prompt.zh: 想一想你所在地区的学生是如何上学的。将它与书中描述的美国校车系统进行比较，写几句话说明它们的异同。

en: Name the way students travel to school where you live.
Compare it with the book's facts about the U.S. school bus system.
zh: 说出你所在地区学生上学出行的方式。
把它与书中关于美国校车系统的事实进行比较。
